description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Heel: 2.5"Product DetailsBeaded thong straps with cut-outs and a synthetic toe separatorCaramel coloured footbed with printed brandingWedge style heelTPR outsole with herringbone grooves at the forefoot and horizontal grooves at the heel regionMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
